'''gayuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabebuia|tabebuia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabebuia|tabebuia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gayuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæyiwith|gæyiwith]] || [[word:gæyiwij|gæyiwij]] || [[word:gæyiwish|gæyiwish]] || [[word:gæyiwi|gæyiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayuyuwuth|gayuyuwuth]] || [[word:gayuyuwuj|gayuyuwuj]] || [[word:gayuyuwush|gayuyuwush]] || [[word:gayuyuwu|gayuyuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayuwuth|gayuwuth]] || [[word:gayuwuj|gayuwuj]] || [[word:gayuwush|gayuwush]] || [[word:gayuwu|gayuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayufwuth|gayufwuth]] || [[word:gayufwuj|gayufwuj]] || [[word:gayufwush|gayufwush]] || [[word:gayufwuf|gayufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gayuwuthu|gayuwuthu]] || [[word:gayuwuju|gayuwuju]] || [[word:gayuwushu|gayuwushu]] || [[word:gayuwuku|gayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gayuwuth|gayuwuth]] || [[word:gayuwuj|gayuwuj]] || [[word:gayuwush|gayuwush]] || [[word:gayuwu|gayuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gayuwuthul|gayuwuthul]] || [[word:gayuwujul|gayuwujul]] || [[word:gayuwushul|gayuwushul]] || [[word:gayuwukul|gayuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gayuwuthuthu|gayuwuthuthu]] || [[word:gayuwujuju|gayuwujuju]] || [[word:gayuwushushu|gayuwushushu]] || [[word:gayuwuku|gayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gayuwuthun|gayuwuthun]] || [[word:gayuwujun|gayuwujun]] || [[word:gayuwushun|gayuwushun]] || [[word:gayuwukun|gayuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gayuwuthuoro|gayuwuthuoro]] || [[word:gayuwujuoro|gayuwujuoro]] || [[word:gayuwushuoro|gayuwushuoro]] || [[word:gayuwukuoro|gayuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
